title: carthamus gummiferus
intro: Carthamus gummiferus, also known as the gum resin plant, is a perennial plant belonging to the sunflower family. It is native to the Mediterranean region and has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Carthamus gummiferus include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Carthamus gummiferus can be prepared in various herbal preparations, such as tinctures, capsules, and infusions, which are used to treat conditions like arthritis, digestive issues, and respiratory problems.
